subcodes.title: Words to Mr and Mrs Hollback, spoken on 1914-04-10
subcodes.first_line: My happiness comes from the Kingdom of Abha! My joy is from the Delectable Paradise!
subcodes.subjects: @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @praise and encouragement, @Manifestation of God as gardener; cultivator, @unity; oneness of humanity, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @love as fire, @The Holy Spirit
